title: FPS Performance
description: Modpack to improve Minecraft performance and FPS.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2be11d498932c889d20b44de41ffd461b015b854.png)This modpack is designed to make Minecraft run as smoothly as possible, even on low-end PCs, while keeping the original vanilla experience intact.

It includes a carefully selected set of mods that:

🚀 Boost FPS with graphical optimizations (Sodium, Starlight, Cull Leaves)
🧠 Reduce RAM and CPU usage (FerriteCore, LazyDFU)
🌍 Improve chunk loading and world generation (Fastload)
🕹️ Optimize entities and mob performance (Clumps, AI Improvements, Entity Culling)

👉 The goal of this pack is simple: a faster, lighter, and more stable Minecraft, perfect for survival, building, or multiplayer adventures.
